title: Fig. 1 in Molecular diagnostics of the honey bee parasites Lotmaria passim and Crithidia spp. (Trypanosomatidae) using multiplex PCR
author: Szalanski, A. L.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Bayesian molecular phylogenetic tree showing relationship of 2 Hawaiian Lotmaria passim positive samples relative to other trypanosomes from Gen- Bank for a 608 bp region of the rDNA SSU gene.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Bayesian molecular phylogenetic tree showing relationship of 2 Hawaiian Lotmaria passim positive samples relative to other trypanosomes from Gen- Bank for a 608 bp region of the rDNA SSU gene.
